name: mad-core
description: Catalog of cross-cutting engineering playbooks for Mad. Each entry is a documented process packaged as a plugin for Claude Code and Cowork.

plugins.name: living-docs
plugins.description: Living-documentation phase — the deterministic docs engine (gen_docs) plus the init-docs (onboard a repo, scaffold the manifest) and generate-docs (fill/update) skills that keep a repo's structured /docs tree alive against the code.
